name: tbone-construction/gallery
title: Project Gallery
description: Filterable project gallery driven by the Projects custom post type. Items open in a lightbox; full details live at /projects/{slug}.

description.default: Explore a selection of completed projects from T-Bone Construction — custom decks, patio canopies, siding, window replacements, sheds, and full home renovations built for homeowners across Twin Falls and the wider Magic Valley. Every project is handled in-house by one local, family-run crew and engineered to stand up to Idaho's weather. Browse by category below, or open any project to see the materials, layout, and finished result.
